company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered automated video editing tools designed specifically for content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms.

pricing_plans.name: Basic Plan
pricing_plans.best_for: Hobbyists and beginners just getting started with content creation

pricing_plans.name: Pro Plan
pricing_plans.best_for: Professional creators and small teams who publish frequently

policies.details: No refunds are provided after 7 days of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be honored in full.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive email support with response times within 24-48 hours.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing cycle.
We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. You will be charged the prorated difference for the remaining billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported as input?
faqs.answer: AutoStream accepts MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM as input formats.
